title: Robust Neural Architecture Search
description: Investigating safety bounds and adversarially robust objective functions for automated deep neural network design. Designed a search space that natively rejects unstable architectures.

title: DeepSpeed Inference Optimizer
description: A high-efficiency compilation pipeline for transformer inference optimization on limited GPU hardware. Achieved 2.4x throughput increase using custom CUDA kernels.

title: Safety Bounds for Vision-Language Models
description: Formulating mathematical verification bounds to guarantee alignment and prevent prompt injection breaches in multimodal embeddings. Introduced JAX-based optimization constraints.

title: Lego-Diff: Auto-diff Engine in Rust
description: An educational, zero-dependency reverse-mode automatic differentiation engine compiled to WebAssembly. Features interactive graph visualizations of computational nodes.

title: Hardware-Aware NAS for Edge TPU
description: A latency-constrained architecture search targeting low-power Google Edge TPU chips. Leveraged evolutionary search algorithms to find optimal speed-accuracy tradeoffs.
